controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-4 Digital Day/Night Temperature Controller

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-4 Digital Day/Night Temperature Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Dr. Heater DR-968, Comfort Zone CZ750, King Electric portable heaters
compatible_devices.notes: Heating mode: relay activates heater when temperature falls below setpoint; deactivates once setpoint is reached. Day and night setpoints independently configurable via built-in photocell. Any 120V electric heater drawing ≤10A is plug-and-play compatible. Controller is 120V only (US market); requires step-down transformer for 230V German market.

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-4 Digital Day/Night Temperature Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_series: Any 120V AC inline or exhaust fan ≤10A
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Can-Fan RK series, Hurricane, Active Air inline fans
compatible_devices.notes: Cooling mode: relay switches fan fully on when temperature exceeds setpoint; on/off only — no variable speed control (relay-based, not triac). For speed-controlled fan operation use BETA-2 instead. Max 10A. Controller is 120V only.

compatible_devices.controller_model: TrolMaster BETA-4 Digital Day/Night Temperature Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Hurricane clip fans, Active Air clip fans, Hydrofarm clip fans
compatible_devices.notes: On/off relay only in cooling mode; activates circulation fan above temperature setpoint. No speed control. Useful as secondary cooling assist in high-temperature situations. Controller is 120V only.
